scripts.dev: node scripts/print-links.js dev && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BACKEND,FRONTEND --prefix-colors cyan,green "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --clearScreen false"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start: npm run build && node scripts/print-links.js start && npm --prefix backend run start:prod
